items.title: AI Agent Tools Moving From Chat to Real Workflows
items.summary: Teams want agents that trigger forms, dashboards, and WhatsApp — not just text replies.
items.proof: Cross-checked with top HN AI discussions and our live automation demos
items.body: Business buyers in India ask for one outcome: fewer manual steps. Agents win when connected to order flows, document OCR, and owner alerts — not standalone chat windows.

items.title: Multilingual AI Assistants Gain Traction for Indian SMBs
items.summary: Hindi/English mixed support in bots and form tools is becoming a default expectation.
items.proof: Mirch WhatsApp bot uses bilingual buttons; form filler demo handles ID OCR in Roman fields
items.body: Products that ignore Hinglish UX lose trust fast. Prefer short button flows over long typed conversations for food, retail, and service businesses.

items.title: How AI Is Changing Business Websites in 2026
items.summary: Smart forms, chat assistants, and analytics dashboards are becoming standard for Indian SMB websites.
items.proof: Backed by live launches: Mirch, Mast Magan, Bhuvan Bhaskar Dham
items.body: Business owners no longer want static brochure websites. They want pages that capture leads, answer questions, and connect to WhatsApp or dashboards.

items.title: WhatsApp Automation ROI for Local Businesses
items.summary: Restaurants, shops, and service businesses save hours weekly with auto-replies and order updates.
items.proof: Live restaurant flow: menu → cart → staff approval → kitchen updates
items.body: When customers message on WhatsApp, speed matters. Automation handles FAQs, shares menus, confirms orders, and routes serious enquiries to staff.
